compiled_state.title: [test-test-batched.sh]: pre-existing failure -> validate.sh --ci flagged
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

tests/.../test-test-batched.sh fails when run via validate.sh / test-batched.sh.

## Symptom
test-test-batched.sh fails when run inside test-batched.sh (timing/concurrency)

## Reproduction
bash tests/[hooks|scripts|integration]/test-test-batched.sh

## Context
Discovered while running validate.sh --ci to unblock scripts/release.sh.
CI on origin/main is GREEN. After fix 7225-7708 (bash-runner.sh honors
SUITE_TEST_INDEX RED markers), the failure remains because no RED marker
exists for these specific function-level failures.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause verified: test_default_state_file_includes_repo_hash invokes test-batched.sh expecting unset TEST_BATCHED_STATE_FILE, but when run via bash-runner the outer state-file env var leaks into the child test process. Fix: env -u TEST_BATCHED_STATE_FILE on the inner invocation.
comments.author: Test
